initial_program:
n_rows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(NCols) :- NCols = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(NRows), R >= 0, R < NRows.
col(C) :- n_cols(NCols), C >= 0, C < NCols.

col_nonzero(C,M) :- col(C), M = #count{ R : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
col_above(Rin,C,A) :- input(Rin, C, V), V != 0, col(C), A = #count{ R1 : input(R1, C, V1), V1 != 0, R1 < Rin }.

output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row(Rin),
    row(Rout),
    Rout = NRows - M + A.

occupied(R,C) :- output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
output(R, C, 0) :- not occupied(R, C), row(R), col(C).

:- row(R), col(C), #count{ Color : output(R, C, Color) } = 1.

#show output/3.

    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row_limit(Rin,NRows),
    row_limit(Rout,NRows),
    M = #count{R: input(R, C, V), V != 0},

output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row(Rin),
    row(Rout),
    Rout = NRows - M + A.

occupied(R,C) :- output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
output(R, C, 0) :- not occupied(R, C), row(R), col(C).

:- row(R), col(C), #count{ Color : output(R, C, Color) } = 1.

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(NCols) :- NCols = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(NRows), R >= 0.
col(C) :- n_cols(NCols), C >= 0.
row_limit(R,NRows) :- row(R), R >= 0, R < NRows.
col_limit(C,NCols) :- col(C), C >= 0, C < NCols.
output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row_limit(Rin,NRows),
    row_limit(Rout,NRows),
    M = #count{R: input(R, C, V), V != 0},
    A = #count{R1 : input(R1, C, V1), V1 != 0, R1 < Rin},
    Rout = 0.
col_nonzero(C,M) :- col(C), M = #count{ R : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
col_above(Rin,C,A) :- input(Rin, C, V), V != 0, col_limit(C,NCols), A = #count{ R1 : input(R1, C, V1), V1 != 0, R1 < Rin }.

output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row(Rin),
    row(Rout),
    Rout = NRows - M + A.

occupied(R,C) :- output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
output(R, C, 0) :- not occupied(R, C), row(R), col(C).

:- row(R), col(C), #count{ Color : output(R, C, Color) } = 1.

n_rows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(NCols) :- NCols = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(NRows), R >= 0.
col(C) :- n_cols(NCols), C >= 0.
row_limit(R,NRows) :- row(R), R >= 0, R < NRows.
col_limit(C,NCols) :- col(C), C >= 0, C < NCols.
output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row_limit(Rin,NRows),
    row_limit(Rout,NRows),
    M = #count{R: input(R, C, V), V != 0},
    A = #count{R1 : input(R1, C, V1), V1 != 0, R1 < Rin},
    Rout = 0.
col_nonzero(C,M) :- col(C), M = #count{ R : input(R, C, V), V != 0 }.
col_above(Rin,C,A) :- input(Rin, C, V), V != 0, col_limit(C,NCols), A = #count{ R1 : input(R1, C, V1), V1 != 0, R1 < Rin }.

output(Rout, C, Color) :-
    input(Rin, C, Color), Color != 0,
    col_nonzero(C, M),
    col_above(Rin, C, A),
    row(Rin),
    row(Rout),
    Rout = NRows - M + A.

occupied(R,C) :- output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
output(R, C, 0) :- not occupied(R, C), row(R), col(C).

:- row(R), col(C), #count{ Color : output(R, C, Color) } = 1.
